title: Darrell Lea Nougat Egg
content:
Darrell Lea Nougat Egg

EASTER GOODIES

Our Easter goodies are made to be shared. Handcrafted with only the finest ingredients, this irresistible Darrell Lea Nougat Easter Egg is made with a light, fluffy coconut nougat centre, then smothered in smooth creamy Darrell Lea milk chocolate. Share the good stuff this Easter.

Looking for more festive treats? Check out our complete guide to Easter candy in Australia for a wide selection of chocolate eggs and Easter lollies to make your celebration extra special.

Find more of the Darrell Lea good stuff at www.dlea.com.au

Darrell Lea Nougat Egg

"Some say we make the most delicious Easter eggs in Australia. The rest don't eat Easter eggs." - Darrell Lea

Buy here

Why Choose Darrell Lea for Easter?

Darrell Lea has been crafting premium chocolate and nougat confections for generations. The Nougat Egg represents the brand's commitment to quality, with its handcrafted construction and use of the finest ingredients. Whether you're treating yourself or preparing Easter candy gifts for family and friends, this 150g egg is the perfect choice.

If you're planning an Easter celebration and want to offer your guests a variety of options, you might also consider our candy gift box selections, which include premium chocolates and confections perfect for the occasion.

What flavour is inside the Darrell Lea Nougat Egg?

The Darrell Lea Nougat Egg features a light, fluffy coconut nougat centre that's wrapped in smooth creamy Darrell Lea milk chocolate, making it a delicious coconut and chocolate combination.

Is the Darrell Lea Nougat Egg handmade?

Yes, this Easter egg is handcrafted using only the finest ingredients, ensuring quality and attention to detail in every bite.

What size is the Darrell Lea Nougat Egg?

The Darrell Lea Nougat Egg is 150g, making it a generous size that's perfect for sharing with family and friends during Easter.

Where can I buy the Darrell Lea Nougat Egg?

You can purchase the Darrell Lea Nougat Egg directly from Sweets World via the product page linked on this site, or visit the official Darrell Lea website at www.dlea.com.au for other retailers.

Is this Easter egg suitable for sharing?

Absolutely! The Darrell Lea Nougat Egg is specifically designed to be shared, making it an ideal Easter gift or treat to enjoy with others.
